days.summary: Baidu’s ERNIE-Image emerged as the strongest concrete artifact in the set: an open 8B-parameter text-to-image model built on a single-stream Diffusion Transformer that claims state-of-the-art performance among open-weight image generators. ByteDance Seed also introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM for real-time conversational audio, while Epoch AI’s MirrorCode added evidence that frontier models can complete some weeks-long software tasks, a meaningful signal for coding-agent roadmaps.
